intro.lead: The franchise model of Dortmund Football School lets you combine your passion for football with a profitable business concept based on practical experience and a clear football philosophy.
intro.point1Text: Structured concept with a strong base for sustainable growth.
intro.point2Text: Training know-how, marketing support and ongoing guidance.
intro.mediaCaption: Discover how our concept combines football know-how, structure and long-term partnership.

model.text: A clear franchise system with a strong base for sustainable growth.

support.text: Benefit from know-how, marketing support and personal guidance.

market.text: Launch in your region with structure, brand and clear processes.

partner.text: Develop your location through exchange, standards and collaboration.

sideCard.title: Let’s start a conversation
sideCard.text: If you would like to learn more about a partnership, we will gladly guide you through the next step.

items.question: HOW HIGH IS THE INITIAL INVESTMENT FOR A LOCATION?
items.answer: The amount of the initial investment depends on the region, scope, and planned implementation. In a personal conversation, we transparently explain which building blocks are relevant and what kind of framework can realistically be expected.

items.question: WHAT REQUIREMENTS SHOULD I BRING AS A PARTNER?
items.answer: Important qualities include enthusiasm for football, a professional approach to working with people, entrepreneurial thinking, and the willingness to build a sustainable offer for children and young people. Experience in sports is helpful, but not the only decisive factor.

items.question: HOW WILL I BE SUPPORTED WHEN BUILDING MY LOCATION?
items.answer: We support our partners in building their location with clear processes, training, proven concepts, and ongoing exchange. This includes organisational support, content guidelines, and help with local positioning.

items.question: HOW CAN I TAKE THE NEXT STEP?
items.answer: If you would like to learn more, you can contact us directly through the contact form. After an initial conversation, we will discuss together whether a partnership fits your goals and our concept.

info.title: Dortmund Football School
paragraphs: Dortmund Football School was founded in 2025. Today, more than 10 coaches work with over 10 clubs across NRW and the Dortmund region. Our programs are independent of individual clubs and follow a holistic development philosophy.
Together, we support the development of young talents – with over 25 years of experience.

facts.title: 25 years of experience
facts.text: Long-standing experience in training, support, and development.

facts.title: 10 partners & > 10 coaches
facts.text: A strong network of partners and qualified coaches.

facts.title: > 7000 children & 10 partner clubs
facts.text: Many children, clubs, and families trust our work.

facts.title: Weekly coach education
facts.text: Continuous development for modern training quality.

facts.title: Training library with > 1000 videos
facts.text: Digital content for training, preparation, and further development.
